creator: dokas@umn.edu
text:
After upgrading my laptop's install ports, X no longer starts properly.
The laptop is a Dell Latitude D820 with an nVidia GeForce Go 7400 graphics
card.  Under the previous nvidia driver, it worked perfectly fine.  With
nvidia-driver-173.14.05, I'm see the same problem described here:

  http://www.nvnews.net/vbulletin/showthread.php?t=113929

Interestingly, this same driver works just fine on my desktop computer
(Dell Precision 380 with an nVidia Quadro FX 1400).

Fix: 

According to the link given above, the only fix is to downgrade the
driver.  Perhaps we could just create a new port such as
x11/nvidia-driver-173 ?
How-To-Repeat: 
  Upgrade certain nVidia equipted laptops to the latest nvidia-driver.
